template.name: Task
template.parameter: const int tid, const int prio, const int rid

transition.label: unlockResource(tid, rid)
release resource and return to idle

query.comment: Deadlock freedom. PCP prevents circular waiting/deadlock by the ceiling admission rule.

query.formula: A[] not (T1.Critical and T2.Critical and owner[R1] == owner[R2])
query.comment: No single task incorrectly owns both resources in this model.
Mutual exclusion on R1, shared by T1 and T3.
If T1 is in its critical section, T1 owns R1.
If T2 is in its critical section, T2 owns R2.
If T3 is in its critical section, T3 owns R1.
Reachability: T1 can enter its critical section.
Reachability: T2 can enter its critical section.
Reachability: T3 can enter its critical section.
